review_title: Mosaic Critical to All Financial & SaaS Metric Modeling, Tracking, & Forecasting
author: Guillaume B.
pros: Mosaic has streamlined all of our reporting and forecasting of fundemental financial metrics. The seamless integration with our ERP, HR, and CRM systems have made the onboarding process very intuiative with the support of a world-class Customer Service team. We are daily Mosaic users and would not be able to scale our business as efficiently without the power of Mosaic.
cons: N/A- all of our product feedback has been taken internally and they continue to release benefial updates to their Product RoadMap.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Mosaic is a next level SaaS FP&A tool vs. traditional planning tools
description: Mosaic is great at taking information from our financial systems, CRM, and HR tools to enable easy financial performance tracking and reporting. With numerous data points needed to report on business performance having all details readily available in one place allows for timely and accurate reporting that formerly took days to manually consolidate and manually update in multiple spreadsheets. Mosaic also enables easier 3 statement scenario and long term planning that can be extremely manual and error prone when done via spreadsheets.
author: Ryan A.
pros: Mosaic allows you to simplify and even automate numerous monthly tasks including ARR reporting, headcount planning, SaaS metric reporting & benchmarking. Building visuals is extremely simple and straightforward and can be easily shared to internal stakeholders. FP&A tasks that historically took multiple days can now be done in a fraction of the time, leaving more time to analyze results and derive key business insights. Implementation and support teams are extremely helpful in go-live and ongoing support.
cons: Some integrations can be limited based on internal structure, but there are workarounds.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great within proper context
description: Overall it's a decent tool. It will be great for comparing budgets to actuals, distributing some simple financial reporting, and simple data interfacing across systems. The limits related to formulated fields in custom metrics make it less efficient for report building.
author: Claire C.
pros: The canvases have a great interface and the ability to change the date range for all reports on a canvas is very convenient. Having a way to distribute financial data where the user can interact with it in a controlled way saves extra seats in financial software and a lot of training on reporting practices.
cons: The customization in building metrics and reports is limited by the code free structure. Not all simple functions are able to translate the formula builder's syntax and there is some functionality from spreadsheet reporting that isn't replicated.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The implementation of Mosaic has been smooth and a true game changer for Eucalyptus.
description: Overall a great experience with Mosaic and looking forward to getting the most out of the tool in time
author: Eden K.
pros: The automated integrations with netsuite and bamboo hr Implementation and mapping went very smoothly The UI/graphs and customisations Customer support is timely and solves problems The AI tool to ask questions is really helpful, especially when it supplements with the video
cons: What do you dislike about Mosaic Tech? Find it sometimes difficult to find certain filters/data updates as it is not where I would expect things to be (not as user friendly in that sense). Unable to integrate to multiple stripe databases
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A great financial tool
description: A great program to help guide you through the financial complexities of our business and help plan for the future.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The quality of the financial reporting is second to none. Easy to use and comprehensive results that keep us in financial track.
cons: Initial conflict with an upgrade but customer support went above and beyond to walk us through the upgrade solution.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Mosaic is a great addition to any tech stack
description: Mosaic turns complex data into executive-ready dashboards, customizable for board meetings, departmental reviews, or investor updates. The interface is intuitive enough for non-finance stakeholders to understand at a glance.
author: Ashley L.
pros: Mosaic is a powerful, intuitive FP&A platform that makes strategic finance faster, smarter, and more collaborative. If you're tired of juggling disconnected spreadsheets and slow reporting cycles, Mosaic might just be the operating system your finance team has been waiting for.
cons: Some learning curve for Excel power users who need to adjust to Mosaic’s model structure and Not yet as customizable as enterprise-grade tools like Anaplan for massive, global organizations.

review_title: Mosaic Software
description: Mosaic is a strategic resource management and planning platform designed to help businesses optimize team allocation, forecast capacity, and manage workloads more efficiently. It's especially well-suited for agencies, consultancies, and professional services firms that juggle multiple projects and teams.
author: Linda B.
pros: Easy-to-use interface with minimal learning curve. Smart automation for faster, more efficient planning. Improves visibility across departments and remote teams. Scalable for small teams to enterprise organizations
cons: Limited offline capabilities. Initial setup and integration can take time depending on your existing stack. Some advanced features may require a higher-tier subscription
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Mosaic is consistently releasing improvements to their product
description: We are using Mosaic for our forecast modeling, analyzing budget to actuals, and compiling our ARR. Once the models and canvases are set up, it is easy to refresh each month in order to quickly produce the reports that we need.
author: Junzhi M.
pros: Mosaic has a very simple interface that is easy to understand. There are multiple systems integrations that seamlessly pull in data. Once you learn how to use the platform, navigation is intuitive . I am a primary user and use Mosaic on a weekly basis. Their support is very responsive and for quick questions, the chatbot is actually useful.
cons: Mosaic is constantly improving on their product. I have used their software for several years and there have been some big improvements. A few things I dislike about the software are: 1. Have to unpublish models before editing them, making it difficult to edit a model and look at the canvas at the same time. 2. Unable to edit data coming in from data sources. I understand that it is important to keep consistency but there are instances where I want to change what department an employee is in for modeling purposes that is different than the department the employee is in in our HRIS system.

review_title: my thoughts
description: My overall experience with Mosaic was one of genuine wonder. even despite its rough edges, it felt like opening a door to a brand-new world.
author: sierra A.
pros: i like mosaic, transformed the web from a technical, into a vibrant intuitive, multimedia experience
cons: Clunky and crash-prone,Slow and inefficient loading,Limited interactivity,Poor support for evolving standards

review_title: Great bit of software worth investing in.
description: Overall, I'd say the software is good at whzt it does and allows users to feel in control of their projects and financials.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I have been around Mosaic for a short time snd found it to be a decent software with a good value for money, ease of use and a fairly simple learning curve. This makes accounting, project tracking, and financial reporting a cinch.
cons: I'm not sure I have any cons for the software. It is well made in my opinion and I would promote it to anyone.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Mosaic - Great Strategic Finance Platform for SaaS companies
description: I've had a great experience with Mosaic. They have a great product that is only getting better and excellent support.
author: Alex A.
pros: Great product for SaaS companies. Easy to use and great out of box setup.
cons: Needs more customization capabilities, but they have been great about constantly adding new ones.

review_title: Mosaic is FP+A walking on water so to speak!
description: Amazing experienceMakes financial reporting and analytics so easy you are now able to focus on strategy and decision making rather than developing reports
author: Warren S.
pros: The New Metrics BuilderForecasting made easy even with super-complex business modelsAbility to see performance any which way you like, in any bucket groupings, in any period, at the touch of a buttonAmazing customer support and amazing onboarding team
cons: There is nothing to dislikeCompany is very dynamic and the team listens to feedback and is always improving and adding features that are rolled out for free to existing users

review_title: Highly Recommend Mosaic
description: Mosaic solves a few core problems that benefit our organization: (1) the integrate multiple, disparate data sources and allow that data to be harnessed in ways not possible without Mosaic; (2) the platform comes with many out-of-the-box dashboards/views that immediately replace less scalable dashboards that we were previously maintaining, saving us time and money; (3) most importantly, Mosaic has allowed us to have much more visibility into our operations, financial health, and areas for strategic improvement.
author: Evan N.
pros: Mosaic's ability to easily integrate multiple, disparate data sources has saved us meaningful amounts of time with month end close, KPI tracking, and actually making the most of our data for forward-looking strategic decision making. Additionally, implementation was a breeze; their customer success team worked closely with us to ensure that we were able to get the most value from the platform as soon as possible.
cons: The learning curve for those who are used to working out of Excel or Google Sheets is somewhat steep, as it's an entirely new system to become familiar with. That said, the training materials were thorough and clearly organized. As long as you have time to dedicate to learning how to make the most of Mosaic, it'll pay off.

review_title: Great data consolidation & efforltessly navigation, but limited resources (yet)
author: Bernardo N.
pros: The fact that it consolidates some of the most important and useful data sources used by entrprises. Very user friendly intarface that allows easy calculations and metric visualization. Support tends to be very helpful and fast.
cons: Most of its features are still not 100% where they should be, normally our reports/models tend to miss some kind of feature that would make it complete, such as reporting formats or the lack of depth in the modelling session, which makes modelling very superficial.

review_title: Intuitive Solution for SMBs. Fantastic support, easy to use, easy to implement.
description: Mosaic has been a great tool for a company our size. We use it monthly during close and to assist our strategic planning. We are constantly reevaluating our forecast and creating multiple scenarios, and Mosaic helps us keep everything straight. Forecasting for any statement-- PL, BS, CF is very intuitive with Mosaic.
author: Jake M.
pros: Support is always quick to respond and trouble shoot no matter what the problem is. This is key for us, especially during close where timelines are tight. Mosaic also has a headcount guided update feature, which has been essential for our close process. Headcount recon can be a major pain, but Mosaic's guided update makes it simple and efficient.
cons: Sometimes our Netsuite integration fails, but usually I just have to retry it and everything flows through. And when it doesn't, Mosaic support is always quick to get things back up and running.

review_title: Easy to use and quick time to value
author: Steven B.
pros: Quick time to value, ease of use and implementation
cons: If your underlying data systems aren't clean, the implementation would probably be tougher

review_title: Mosaic has provided our company with valuable insights that have improved our financial health
author: Cillian R.
pros: This is a very powerful tool that can provide an in-depth analysis of how every dollar is spent in an organisation. It has so many out-of-the-box KPIs. Once implemented, it has saved our finance function hours each week. We are no longer doing non-add-value tasks but more strategic analysis.
cons: It will require an investment of time on your behalf to get familiar with how the system works; however, this also demonstrates the depth of the product. In the long run, you'll be paid back multiples times over.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Mosaic - Great Tool for SaaS FP&A
description: Excellent
author: Joshua C.
pros: Ease of use, flexibility, and that it's tailored to SaaS
cons: Not as robust as some other tools, so may not work for all companies, but excellent for our SaaS organization

review_title: Great Customer Support
description: - We reduced the amount of guessing in our forecast thanks to the modeling tool.- Reduced the amount of manual calculations.- Provided more visibility to the whole team
author: Luis B.
pros: Apart from all the tools and capabilities witihin Mosaic. Their support team (especially Eli) were really helpful in the implementation and reducing the learning curve.
cons: It was a little complicated to understand and the learning curve can take time. But as I said, the customer support was great in helping as much as they could and providing guidance when needed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Accurate and easy to use
description: My overall experience has been very positive. It is heads above keeping track on a spreadsheet or time clock.
author: Sadie H.
pros: It is very simple and easy to use. It puts all necessary tools in one place, making it user and admin friendly.
cons: The only complaint I have is that it does sometimes have bugs, but it’s nothing that restarting it doesn’t help.

review_title: Great Product!
description: We have had a great overall experience. I love the AI forecasting tools, it helps us to keep moving in the right direction.
author: Julie M.
pros: Mosaic has really changed how we organize our projects. It has given us freedom from spreadsheets. It helps us to plan projects and gives all the metrics we need to track our progress and helps us as we are growing our business.
cons: There was a bit of a learning curve getting used to a new system.

review_title: Great product
description: It is a ten on ten experience as they help set up the system and provide advice when modeling.
author: Andrew C.
pros: Ease of use, report building, consolidation & support from Mosaic.
cons: Institutional investors have difficulty getting internal approval to access the platform. I need to extract the reports in excel which is time consuming.

review_title: Great for Project Management
description: We use Mosaic mainly for project management and document storage. Prior to this, we did everything manually and it was very inefficient. Now with Mosaic, we can easily see a project and the status along with all the documentation that goes with it. Everything is so organized and easy to find. This was a huge help to our business.
author: Lisa S.
pros: I like the organization of the documents and project management. I can easily see a projects status and understand where we are at without asking anyone.
cons: It was a little difficulty learning something new but we made a giant leap from a manual process to Moasic so a learning curve was expected.

review_title: Great for analysis
description: Mosaic has been helpful for analysis however we have struggled with getting forecasting up to speed.
author: Zac C.
pros: The analysis has been reallly insightful in getting all our data collated in one space. We can now quickly and easily compare metrics that in the past took a lot of time to create.
cons: We still find Excel much easier to manipulate in terms of forecasting. Resource planning seems quite restrictive in terms of business specific inputs that we want to create

review_title: Mosaic's ease of setup and data import capabilities make it a very useful FPA tool
description: Positive experience. Still in the early stages, but looking forward to building out the tool over time.
author: Mark S.
pros: Ease of implementation and ease of use. Directly connecting to our GL and CRM tools has been great for reporting and forecasting capabilities.
cons: Built more for SAAS revenue clients. We worked with Mosaic's solution consultants to help build forecasting and reporting tools that work for a project based business such as ours.
